articles.title: Iran war may cause food shortages in Africa, world’s largest fertiliser firm says
articles.description:
Yara CEO warns of global auction that would leave poorest countries scrambling for supplies they can ill afford
The Iran war could have “dramatic consequences”, causing food shortages and price rises in some of Africa’s poorest and most vulnerable communities, the head of the world’s largest fertiliser company has said.
Svein Tore Holsether, the chief executive of Yara International, said world leaders needed to guard against soaring prices and shortages of fertiliser causing a de facto global auction that would leave the poorest countries, particularly in Africa, scrambling for supplies they could ill afford.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: From school to PG, girls now outnumber boys
articles.description: India witnesses a significant shift as girls now lead in education, outperforming boys in school enrolment and higher education pass-outs. While the overall literacy gap persists, younger generations show near parity. Women dominate fields like MPhil and arts, though men still lead in STEM, indicating ongoing gendered career paths.

articles.title: Small-cap stocks rebound in April with best month in a decade
articles.description: India's small-cap stocks experienced their strongest monthly rally in at least a decade during April, recovering significantly after a sharp March sell-off. Local investors actively bought beaten-down stocks, with the Nifty Smallcap 250 index jumping 17.1%. This surge followed a period where many small-cap stocks had declined, attracting interest in quality businesses with strong growth prospects.

articles.description: Increased instances of snakebites and resultant deaths have spread panic in Kerala. Sarath Babu George speaks to members of the bereaved families and herpetologists and other experts to understand the magnitude of the situation

articles.title: China’s EV price war turns into AI arms race beyond cheaper cars
articles.description: Chinese EV firms are rapidly rolling out in-car AI features to gain an edge, but as the price war drags on, those technologies are quickly becoming commoditized.

articles.title: Lift abortion time limit for minor rape survivors: Supreme Court
articles.description: Says State and doctors cannot make such decisions for minor rape survivors; CJI calls for penal law amendment to ensure trials in such cases completed within a week, accused’s property transferred to victim

articles.title: Unmindful of nature’s vagaries, their toil for survival continues
articles.description: Climate change and rising temperatures are a global concern, and environmental experts are calling for urgent measures to address this crisis. However, for informal workers, changing temperatures hardly matter, as they cannot afford to miss even a single day of work. Despite the intense conditions, they continue working with few or no protective measures, explains Nellore Sravani

articles.title: Kolkata on IMD's alert for heavy rains — Check heatwave status and Bengaluru and Delhi's weather forecast here
articles.description: The India Meteorological Department issued orange alert for several states. Bengaluru and Kolkata can expect heavy rains today. Check heatwave status and Delhi's weather forecast here.

articles.title: New LPG rules from 1 May: Booking interval, OTP-based delivery; check rates in Bengaluru, Delhi, Mumbai today
articles.description: From 1 May, changes to LPG booking and delivery will take effect, including longer booking intervals and the mandatory use of OTP for deliveries. The price of a 19-kg commercial LPG cylinder has been increased significantly.

articles.title: Out or not out? 'Sufficient evidence' that Holder's catch wasn't legit, says Bishop
articles.description: "To me that's not out because the ball should not touch the ground," Abhinav Mukund says on Rajat Patidar's dismissal

topStories.title: Video captures massive explosion as NYPD officers approach home, 1 dead
topStories.description: A body believed to be that of the suspect was recovered after an explosion triggered a five-alarm fire at a home in Queens early Thursday morning.

topStories.description: Oil prices hit a 4-year high as Axios reports Trump will hear new options to try to break the Strait of Hormuz standoff with Iran with a new wave of attacks.

topStories.title: 2 employees killed in Kentucky bank robbery, suspect at large, police say
topStories.description: Kentucky State Police said a man went to a U.S. Bank in Brea, Kentucky, and shot and killed a man and a woman, both employees at the bank.

topStories.description: The suspect, a student, was detained at the scene, police said.

topStories.description: Jeanine Pirro, the US attorney for Washington, posted the video amid questions over whose bullet struck a Secret Service officer as the shooter ran towards the ballroom.

topStories.title: Fever star Caitlin Clark avoids serious injury after scary fall leads to early exit in preseason game
topStories.description: Caitlin Clark left the Indiana Fever preseason game against the Dallas Wings after colliding with Alanna Smith, but appeared to avoid a serious knee injury.

dailyNews.description: Iran US War LIVE Updates: Although the ceasefire has been extended, tensions remain high. Iran continues to exert control over the Strait of Hormuz, while the US Navy is enforcing a blockade aimed at stopping Iranian oil shipments from reaching global markets.

dailyNews.title: Ex US Open Finalist Nishikori To Retire From Tennis At The End Of This Year
dailyNews.description: Making his professional debut in 2007, Nishikori became the first Japanese player to advance to the final of a Grand Slam men's singles tournament at the 2014 Open in New York, which he lost in...

dailyNews.title: Dominican migrant with deportation order, wanted for murder in home country freed by Biden-appointed judge
dailyNews.description: A suspected illegal migrant with an Interpol Red Notice for murder was ordered released from ICE custody by a Biden-appointed judge, DHS says.

dailyNews.title: Wyoming official faces backlash after posting 'hang bad judges' comment on abortion ruling
dailyNews.description: Wyoming city councilman Troy Bray draws criticism after posting that the state should "hang bad judges" following a ruling blocking an abortion ban.

dailyNews.title: Inside the Utah courtroom where Taylor Frankie Paul and Dakota Mortensen faced off
dailyNews.description: SALT LAKE CITY, Utah — After weeks of headlines about domestic disputes, physical violence, criminal investigations and off-screen drama, a Utah judge put it to reality stars Taylor Frankie Paul and Dakota Mortensen simply: You “need to stay away from each other.”The judge ultimately granted the “The Secret Lives of Mormon Housewives” stars mutual protective orders during a Thursday court hearing.

dailyNews.title: Oil rises over $1 with no sign of Iran conflict ending
dailyNews.description: Oil prices climbed Friday as Iran conflict resolution efforts stalled, with Tehran blocking the Strait of Hormuz and the U.S. Navy restricting Iranian crude exports. Brent crude futures rose to $111.59 a barrel, and WTI futures reached $105.46, marking four consecutive months of gains.  Tensions escalated with threats of "long and painful strikes" on U.S. positions if attacks resume.

dailyNews.title: Former colleagues detail CHP captain’s spiral before alleged murder-for-hire plot against husband
dailyNews.description: Former CHP colleagues testify at alleged hitman's trial that Capt. Julie Harding spiraled before her estranged husband was fatally shot in Tennessee.

dailyNews.title: Doctor and son accused of running dangerous side-business scheme in New York
dailyNews.description: A father-son duo allegedly ran a pill mill scheme in New York, with the doctor accused of writing dozens of fraudulent prescriptions for addictive drugs.

dailyNews.title: Ex-cellmate says he found suicide note from Jeffrey Epstein
dailyNews.description: A suicide note purportedly written by Jeffrey Epstein is locked inside the case file of Nicholas Tartaglione, Epstein's ex-cellmate, Tartaglione told The New York Times.

dailyNews.title: Yen trims gains against dollar after Japan's intervention in markets
dailyNews.description: Japan's currency, the yen, saw a slight dip against the dollar on Friday. However, it is set for its strongest weekly rise in over two months. This comes after Japanese officials stepped in to support the yen. Investors are watching closely for more action. Oil prices remain high due to threats against US positions.

dailyNews.title: Australia and Japan markets climb, looking past Iran war escalation fears
dailyNews.description: This comes as investors took in strong earnings stateside, looking past weaker-than-expected economic data and threats of escalation in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Camp Mystic withdraws application for 2026 camp license, will not reopen
dailyNews.description: This comes on the heels of the first public hearing over last summer's Fourth of July floods that killed more than 100 people across the Hill Country, including 27 girls at Camp Mystic.

topStories.description: Israeli attacks on Lebanon killed at least 2,586 people and wounded more than 8,000 since March 2, local media report.

topStories.title: DOJ releases new video showing Correspondents’ Dinner suspect running through security
topStories.description: The Department of Justice released new video that shows the suspect in the White House Correspondents’ Dinner shooting running through the security checkpoint and appearing to point his weapon at a Secret Service agent. NBC News’ Kelly O’Donnell breaks down the new images.

topStories.title: Trump gives the go-ahead for a major new Canada-U.S. oil pipeline
topStories.description: More state and federal approvals are needed for the 3-foot-wide Bridger Pipeline Expansion, which would stretch from the Canadian border with Montana down through eastern Montana and Wyoming, where it would link up with another pipeline.

topStories.title: Trump’s Plans to Boost Weapons Production Might Not Deliver for Years
topStories.description: While the defense industry has announced plans to make more munitions, much of that expanded production will not quickly kick in.

topStories.title: Trump drops MAHA favorite for surgeon general pick who has critiqued RFK Jr.
topStories.description: Nicole Saphier, Trump’s third pick for the role, is a radiologist and longtime Fox News contributor. Means’s nomination stalled as some Republicans questioned her credentials and stance on vaccinations.

dailyNews.title: First US-Venezuela flight lands in Caracas after seven-year suspension
dailyNews.description: American Airlines has resumed flights as Donald Trump moves to rebuild ties following the abduction of Nicolas Maduro.

dailyNews.title: US gas reaches $4.30 per gallon; Trump says prices will drop after Iran war
dailyNews.description: Price of petrol in US jumps by nearly 30 cents in one week amid Strait of Hormuz blockade and Iran diplomatic deadlock.

dailyNews.title: Trump signs DHS funding bill, ending shutdown for most of agency, including TSA
dailyNews.description: Trump on Thursday signed legislation to fund the Department of Homeland Security after the House approved the bill earlier in the afternoon.

dailyNews.title: Trump pulls Casey Means' stalled surgeon general nomination, announces new pick
dailyNews.description: President Trump says he's nominating former Fox News Channel contributor Dr. Nicole Saphier for surgeon general after Dr. Casey Means' path forward stalled in the Senate over questions about her experience and her stance on vaccines.

dailyNews.title: Tracking who Trump is appointing to fill key administration roles
dailyNews.description: Follow President Trump’s progress filling over 800 positions, among about 1,300 that require Senate confirmation, in this tracker from The Washington Post and the Partnership for Public Service.

dailyNews.title: Hegseth argues Iran ceasefire ‘pauses’ deadline for Congress’s approval
dailyNews.description: The War Powers Act requires that the Trump administration seek lawmakers’ consent to continue hostilities beyond 60 days, a time limit that expires Friday.

dailyNews.title: Mapping where the redistricting fight stands and where it’s headed
dailyNews.description: As Trump pushes for a more Republican-friendly House map, more than half a dozen states are potential targets for mid-decade tweaks to congressional boundaries.

dailyNews.title: Oil price hits highest since 2022 after report Trump to be briefed on new Iran options
dailyNews.description: Axios reported that US Central Command has prepared a plan for a wave of "short and powerful" strikes on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Record-long Department of Homeland Security shutdown ends
dailyNews.description: In addition to the DHS funding bill, President Donald Trump also signed into law a short-term extension of the foreign spy program known as FISA.

dailyNews.title: Mike Johnson says U.S. 'not at war' with Iran as key deadline nears
dailyNews.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson, R-La., said Thursday that it is not necessary for Congress to weigh in on the Trump administration’s military action in Iran because the United States is currently “not at war.”“I don’t think we have an active, kinetic military bombing, firing or anything like that.

dailyNews.title: New video shows WHCD suspect inside hotel before rushing security checkpoint with weapon
dailyNews.description: Newly released Justice Department footage appears to show the White House Correspondents' Dinner shooting suspect rushing a security checkpoint armed.

dailyNews.title: ‘The Apprentice’ reboot buzz builds as Trump says Don Jr has ‘charisma’ for the role
dailyNews.description: President Trump addressed rumors "The Apprentice" could return with Donald Trump Jr. as host, saying his son would "be probably good" for it.
